授業方法: 1. Classes will be conducted in English only and English will be the means of communication between the students and the instructor. (Students will also be expected to communicate with one another in English.)2. Students are encouraged to actively participate in class discussions, both independently and collaboratively, in order to enhance their competence and confidence in English and also to create a better learning environment for all.

成績評価Grading0: 評価基準等　Grading Criteria etc.
成績評価Grading1: There will be three exam held during the semester.
成績評価Grading2: 授業外学修課題／Assignment, homework required outside class (06)
Students will be required to do vocabulary and listening homework each week to prepare for the next class.
成績評価Grading3: プレゼンテーション・発表／Presentation (07)
Performance in a group or solo presentation.
成績評価Grading4: 授業への参加度（自発性、積極性、主体性、等）／In-class participation,contribution (09)
Students will be graded based on how much they participate in class and group activities.
成績評価Grading5: 備考　Note The student’s grade will bebased on quizzes, writing assignments, and oral presentations. No final examwill be given during the exam period. Those students who miss five or moreclasses during the term will receive 0 points for this course.

name: 【100】英語I（コミュニケーション）　１０／English I (Communication)
担当者: コンデン　Ｒ．Ｇ．（CONDON ROBERT GRAHAM）
成績評価備考:
備考　Note
The student’s grade will be based on quizzes, writing assignments, and oral presentations. No final exam will be given during the exam period. Those students who miss five or more classes during the term will receive 0 points for this course.
